name: Rick Tyler
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Iowa is turning out enthusiastic crowds for Ted Cruz. With each
stop we are more and more encouraged as Iowans unite in support
of Ted Cruz. On Monday night, over 300 people crowded into
Penny's Diner to meet Ted. That would not have been too unusual
except that it was 11:00 pm at night. People of all ages stood on
tables and chairs to get a good view and spoke with Ted about how
this is our time to reignite the promise of America.

And last night, over
600 people jammed our event in Sioux Center.

At every packed
event, Ted does not leave without shaking hands and connecting
with all who come out to get to know him as a tested, and
trusted, leader.

Best,

Rick Tyler
Communications
Director
www.tedcruz.org

CRUZ NEWS

The Resurgent: Ted
Cruz Has Skyrocketed 19 Points in Three Months in California

The Blaze: Exclusive:
As President, Ted Cruz Vows to Make It Harder to Purchase Guns -
for Criminals

Washington Times: Ted
Cruz - ethanol's best friend

Washington Examiner:
Liberty Caucus leader abandons Paul to support Cruz

Sean Hannity: Watch:
HILARIOUS New Cruz Ad Takes On Illegal Immigration...Guess Who's
Crossing The Border

PRESS RELEASES

Cruz for President
Launches TV Ad "Invasion"

VIDEOS

#CruzinToCaucus Bus
Tour - Day Two

TWEET

WATCH: day two of the
#CruzinToCaucus tour was a huge success: http://bit.ly/1RarU93
Join: tedcruz.org/iowa

Watch: HILARIOUS New
@TedCruz Ad Takes On Illegal Immigration...Guess Who's Crossing
The Border: http://bit.ly/1TEbZNT

READ and RT: @TedCruz
SURGES to TOP SPOT in California http://bit.ly/1ONyc7Q #CruzCrew

POST ON FACEBOOK

WATCH: day two of the
#CruzinToCaucus tour was a huge success: http://bit.ly/1RarU93
RSVP to join: tedcruz.org/iowa

Watch: HILARIOUS New
Ted Cruz Ad Takes On Illegal Immigration...Guess Who's Crossing
The Border! http://bit.ly/1TEbZNT

READ and SHARE: Ted
Cruz SURGES to TOP SPOT in California http://bit.ly/1ONyc7Q

TED ON THE AIR

10:45 am ET: Ted
Cruz on the Mike Gallagher Show - LISTEN HERE

10:00 pm ET: Ted
Cruz on the Steve Deace Show - LISTEN HERE

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

name: Marco Rubio
subject: FIGHT FOR GUN RIGHTS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45689195:6dEGuLrN8:m:1:1349778030:90C0AC1DC1B1F7D70F8169CB33FB3273:r)
---
| Peter,
**Obama has waged a war on the Constitution.** His plans to invoke Executive Action to limit and erode the 2nd Amendment are deplorable and must be stopped. When I am elected President, on Day One I will undo these actions done by President Obama. But I can only do that if I win the Republican nomination. [**If you stand against Barack Obama and his actions against the 2nd Amendment, please add your name to my FIGHT FOR GUN RIGHTS petition.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45689194:6dEGuLrN8:m:1:1349778030:90C0AC1DC1B1F7D70F8169CB33FB3273:r)
---
| I hope after you add your name to my [**Fight for Gun Rights**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45689194:6dEGuLrN8:m:1:1349778030:90C0AC1DC1B1F7D70F8169CB33FB3273:r) petition you will forward this to your friends and family and encourage them to support our campaign as well. [**I will never stop standing up for our Constitution and supporting law-abiding gun-owners in America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45689194:6dEGuLrN8:m:1:1349778030:90C0AC1DC1B1F7D70F8169CB33FB3273:r) If you are as disgusted as I am by Obama's abuse of power, then stand with me today. Marco P.S. Today's announcement by Obama is just one of many examples of his complete disregard for our nation's laws. He is going to spend his last year in office destroying as much as he can. I need your help to ensure that I can undo these terrible wrongs. [**If you stand against Barack Obama and his actions against the 2nd Amendment, please add your name to my FIGHT FOR GUN RIGHTS petition.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45689194:6dEGuLrN8:m:1:1349778030:90C0AC1DC1B1F7D70F8169CB33FB3273:r) I hope after you add your name to my [**Fight for Gun Rights petition**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45689194:6dEGuLrN8:m:1:1349778030:90C0AC1DC1B1F7D70F8169CB33FB3273:r) you will forward this to your friends and family and encourage them to support our campaign as well.
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Dispatch from New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

The media wants to black me out.

They try to ignore how my message of liberty.
They tout flawed polls and push ridiculous debate rules designed
to silence me and my supporters.

But it isn't working.

Last night it Exeter, New Hampshire, I met
with a packed, overflow crowd over 300 people standing
shoulder-to-shoulder to hear my message.

I told them about my plan to Audit the Fed
and the upcoming vote next week

I told them how I am the only fiscal
conservative in this race with a plan to balance the budget and
cut taxes.

I told them how I am the only candidate who
is standing up for the entire Bill of Rights.

I told them about how we need a rational
foreign policy that puts our national security first while
staying out of nation building and civil wars

This is the same message I've delivered to
packed rooms all over the state of New Hampshire this week

Don't be fooled by the media. Our message is
growing louder. It is resonating. It is being heard.

And it is a message that can win.

I'm heading to Iowa for three days after
this. I hope and fully expect to see more of the same.

I am in this to win.

If you are too, I ask you to stand with me
these next 30 days.

This is crunch time. It's the most critical
time of the whole campaign.

So Patriot, I must ask for your support to
help me keep our momentum growing during this most critical time.

Please dig deep and give whatever you can
afford, whether that's $500, $250, $100 or $50, $25 or $10.

As we've seen in the past, a last-minute
surge can catapult a candidate to the top of the pack.

With your help, that's exactly where I plan
to be.

So please be as generous as you can.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

Chip in $25 >>

Chip in $50 >>

Chip in $75 >>

Chip in $100 >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Marco Rubio
subject: 55 Degrees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45696754:6tdbDLrNU:m:1:1349778030:410C27DE91E2F3DE445276F98F4BD737:r)
---
| 55 degrees. Peter, that's what the weather is going to be in Charleston, South Carolina next Thursday. However I can guarantee that it will be hotter inside the Republican Debate . . . because unfortunately some of my opponents are full of hot air.
But this is still a strong field, and it promises to be a great evening of lively debate and discussion of the important issues facing our nation. I'll be there, Peter: would you like to join me?
**[Donate $5 right now to enter to win a trip to next week's Republican Debate in Charleston!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45696755:6tdbDLrNU:m:1:1349778030:410C27DE91E2F3DE445276F98F4BD737:r)** I'll be announcing the winner on Friday, so there isn't much time to enter! **[Enter now by following this link.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45696756:6tdbDLrNU:m:1:1349778030:410C27DE91E2F3DE445276F98F4BD737:r)** I hope I'll see you next week in South Carolina! Marco P.S. Sunny skies, heated debate, what could be better? The only thing I can think of is if you join me there next week! **[Please follow this link to donate $5 or more to be entered to win a trip to Charleston.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45696756:6tdbDLrNU:m:1:1349778030:410C27DE91E2F3DE445276F98F4BD737:r)**
---
| | [**Enter To Win** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45696755:6tdbDLrNU:m:1:1349778030:410C27DE91E2F3DE445276F98F4BD737:r)
---
| **South Carolina Debate Contest Rules**
* Contest ends January 7, 2016.
* Limit one entry per individual
* Make a contribution and also enter
* You can also enter [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45696757:6tdbDLrNU:m:1:1349778030:410C27DE91E2F3DE445276F98F4BD737:r)
* See full terms & conditions below.

**NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, click [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45696756:6tdbDLrNU:m:1:1349778030:410C27DE91E2F3DE445276F98F4BD737:r). To enter without making a contribution, click [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45696758:6tdbDLrNU:m:1:1349778030:410C27DE91E2F3DE445276F98F4BD737:r). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on January 3, 2016 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on January 7, 2016 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time onJanuary 7, 2016. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in North Charleston, South Carolina on January 14, 2016; roundtrip airfare for the winner and a guest; hotel accommodations for winner and guest . Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Prize not redeemable for cash. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. The Sponsor is Marco Rubio for President, PO Box 558701, Miami, Florida, 33255.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: BREAKING: Fox News (Planned Parenthood)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| **House GOP: First task sending White House bill...defunding Planned Parenthood**
\-- _Fox News_ , 1/2/2016 Friends,

We've barely cleaned up the confetti from New Years, and already Republicans in the House are coming after women's health. Again.

**Republicans have set a vote for TODAY to defund Planned Parenthood.[Click here and add your name to tell them NO.](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2254/738133e4/3b5b50b5/7f839560/1131915056/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160106m")**

Now, I want to be very, very clear about what defunding Planned Parenthood really means. Title X Family Planning funds -- the federal funds used by Planned Parenthood -- are already prohibited by law from being used on abortion procedures.

**By cutting funding to Planned Parenthood, Republicans are cutting funds for vital health care.** They're cutting money for cancer screenings, STI testing and treatment, HIV tests, and much more.

[**Before the vote, make sure the GOP hears your voice. We should be defending women 's access to care -- not defunding it. Tell Republicans: NO on defunding Planned Parenthood.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2254/738133e4/3b5b50b5/7f839560/1131915056/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160106m")

It's disgraceful that one of the first actions of 2016 is to go after women's access to health care. We can't let them get away with it.

Thanks so much for adding your voice to mine.

Patrick

| | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2254/738133e4/3b5b50b5/7f839561/1131915056/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

Again. Republicans have set a vote for TODAY to defund Planned Parenthood. "" Now, I want to be very, very clear about what defunding Planned Parenthood really means. Title X Family Planning funds -- the federal funds used by Planned Parenthood -- are already prohibited by law from being used on abortion procedures. By cutting funding to Planned Parenthood, Republicans are cutting funds for vital health care. They're cutting money for cancer screenings, STI testing and treatment, HIV tests, and much more. "" It's disgraceful that one of the first actions of 2016 is to go after women's access to health care. We can't let them get away with it. Thanks so much for adding your voice to mine. Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""

name: Eric Greitens
subject: Lend a hand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
I hope your new year is off to an awesome start. Here on the
campaign, everything is fantastic! Sheena, Joshua, and I really
enjoyed our Christmas vacation - though Joshua was terrified of
getting his picture taken with Santa!

You have probably seen the horrific images on the news from the
flooding that has destroyed many communities right here at home.
The water levels reached historic highs and devastated countless
neighborhoods, leaving families stranded.

Instead of just watching, we want to do something about it. Our
team is taking a break from the campaign trail on Friday to lend
a hand in the cleanup and recovery efforts. If you are interested
in joining our team to help out on Friday morning please email
Krystal@ericgreitens.com.

I'd ask that you also consider making a donation to the American
Red Cross of Eastern Missouri to help with the recovery. Every
dollar you contribute will go towards restoring the life of a
local Missouri family.

There are thousands of volunteers who have stepped up to make a
difference. This awful disaster has shown the very best of our
people. I have no doubt that we will recover and rebuild - and
come back stronger and better than ever.

Let's lead by example, and let's show the nation our heart and
our willingness to serve. After all, Missouri is the Show-Me
state!

I hope to see you on Friday!

Best,

Eric

If you have previously given, we have a different email on file
for you or have not connected your email with your donor profile.
Feel free to email us at team@ericgreitens.com to have this
fixed.

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

This message was intended for: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com
You were added to the system September 30, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJQOPWLrNk

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJQOPWLrNk

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Support common-sense gun safety measures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

More than 30,000 Americans are killed by guns each year. More than 20,000 children under 18 were killed by firearms over the last decade. But Congress has not made a move to help.

We still haven't expanded background checks: an idea which a majority of Republicans, Democrats, and even NRA members support. **Individuals on the FBI 's Terrorist Watchlist can still walk into a store and buy a gun legally.**

And my Republican opponents STILL refuse to take any action at all.

I will not settle for stagnation. There are areas where we all agree we can do a better job keeping Americans safe. [**I 'm calling on my Republican opponents to step up, take a stand, and work with Democrats toward common-sense gun safety measures. Click here to add your name and join me.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2250/738133e4/3b5a5cdc/7f839656/229193955/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160107b")

Thank you.

Patrick

| | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2250/738133e4/3b5a5cdc/7f839657/229193955/VEsE/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Dear Friend, Here at campaign headquarters, we've jumped into the new year with gusto. Team Katie is preparing a packed schedule of campaign events, volunteers are flooding the office, and supporters are reaching out to find out how they can help. But even in the midst of all this excitement, I wanted to take a moment to thank you. Our campaign launched only five months ago, and just in that short time, more than 7,000 donors have stepped up to chip in whatever they could afford to show their support. Thanks to you, we beat each and every goal we set in 2015. **That 's the kind of fuel that has our campaign going so strong, and that's the kind of energy that's going to carry us to victory on Election Day.** So thank you. Thank you for your commitment, and thank you for your support. If you're interested in learning more about our campaign, be sure to check out the brand new website we launched just this morning: **[KatieMcGinty.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/586853443583344640/6127732233223536640).** It's the best way to keep track of what's happening on the campaign and exciting ways you can get involved. | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/586853443583344640/6199789827261464576)
---

Thank you again for your support this past year. Every dollar makes a difference, and every single contribution gets us closer to winning this seat and taking back the Senate.
Wishing you and your loved ones all the best in 2016,
Katie

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/586853443583344640/6271847421299392512?refcode=e201616&refcode2=e201616&amount=10)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/586853443583344640/6055674639185608704).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Daniel Santorum
subject: Friend, a free trip to Charleston, SC!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,

On January 14th, my Dad will make another powerful case to this nation for defeating ISIS, strengthening the American family and bringing jobs back for the American worker. He's the conservative in this race that has a record of success and, I believe, is the serious leader we need for these serious times. This next debate is promising to be a powerful one. _**And it will be in the city that has felt like home to me for the past several years -- Charleston, South Carolina.**_ Friend, would you and a friend like to join us in Charleston, South Carolina for the debate as our personal guest? Your flight, hotel and a pair of tickets are on us, and all you need to do is enter the sweepstakes to be eligible. [****Your donation of $20.16 or more will automatically enter you win!****](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fcharleston-debate%3Fsc%3Ddaniel_debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=daniel_debate&n=1) I hope to meet you, show you around Charleston and escort you, as our VIP to one of the last Republican Presidential Debates before the Iowa Caucus. [Enter Here with your support of $20.16 or more!](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fcharleston-debate%3Fsc%3Ddaniel_debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=daniel_debate&n=2) Regards, Cadet Daniel Santorum _**P.S. Also, this time, I'm offering you a personal tour of The Citadel in addition to VIP access to the debate!**_

> NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Void where prohibited. All applicable federal, state, and local laws and regulations apply. Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fcharleston-debate%3Fsc%3Ddaniel_debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=daniel_debate&n=3) to enter by making a contribution of $20.16. Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/debate_contest?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=daniel_debate&n=4) to enter without making a contribution. You must complete and submit the online entry form during the contest period. This Promotion begins on Wednesday, January 6, 2016 at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Sunday, January 10, 2016 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time (“Entry Period”). All entries must be received by11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, January 10, 2016. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Charleston, SC on January 14, 2016; a $600 travel stipend for travel to Charleston, South Carolina for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250. Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Santorum For President 2016, PO Box 247 Verona, PA 15147.

---
Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=daniel_debate&n=5) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=daniel_debate&n=6) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=daniel_debate&n=7), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=daniel_debate&n=8), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=daniel_debate&n=9).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=daniel_debate&n=10)

name: Signature Needed (via boldpac.com)
subject: 32,314 signatures... but yours isn't one of them?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
---
| [Thousands of Democrats have already signed on to thank President Obama for his historic actions to curb gun violence. ](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea728/e60883a/7191fea3/1442701e/2182430801/VEsH/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.06_B2_thank-obama_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
---
[](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea728/e60883a/7191fea3/1442701e/2182430801/VEsE/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.06_B2_thank-obama_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
_[But it looks like your name is still missing.](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea728/e60883a/7191fea3/1442701e/2182430801/VEsF/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.06_B2_thank-obama_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")_
[_http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama_](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea728/e60883a/7191fea3/1442701e/2182430801/VEsC/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.06_B2_thank-obama_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
[↓ ↓ ↓ ](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea728/e60883a/7191fea3/1442701e/2182430801/VEsD/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.06_B2_thank-obama_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
[Yesterday,](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea728/e60883a/7191fea3/1442701e/2182430801/VEsA/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.06_B2_thank-obama_X__F1_S1_C1__ns") President Obama took a huge and historic step toward solving the gun violence epidemic plaguing this country.

From the East Room of the White House, the President announced an executive action to close the notorious "gun-show loophole" and provide critical resources to streamline our background-check system. [](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea728/e60883a/7191fea3/1442701e/2182430801/VEsB/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.06_B2_thank-obama_X__F1_S1_C1__ns") While Congress still has yet to produce a more comprehensive solution to gun violence, the President's actions mark a significant first step in addressing this deadly problem.

SIGN YOUR NAME: [Thank President Obama for standing up to the gun lobby and taking action to stop gun violence ->](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea728/e60883a/7191fea3/1442701e/2182430801/VEsO/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.06_B2_thank-obama_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")

But look, right-wing Republicans in Congress are already FUMING over the President's executive actions. They're vowing to **defund the Department of Justice** in order to ensure these common-sense measures aren't implemented.

That's why it's absolutely imperative we stand with President Obama to combat the devastating gun violence routinely sweeping this country and focus on real solutions to leave a safer country for our children.

**[Add your name today to thank President Obama for taking a stand against gun violence:](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea728/e60883a/7191fea3/1442701e/2182430801/VEsP/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.06_B2_thank-obama_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")**

[http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea728/e60883a/7191fea3/1442701e/2182430801/VEsHBQ/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-President-Obama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.06_B2_thank-obama_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")

Thanks for speaking up,

_BOLD PAC_

|

clean_body: | "" "" "" "" "" "" President Obama took a huge and historic step toward solving the gun violence epidemic plaguing this country. From the East Room of the White House, the President announced an executive action to close the notorious "gun-show loophole" and provide critical resources to streamline our background-check system. "" While Congress still has yet to produce a more comprehensive solution to gun violence, the President's actions mark a significant first step in addressing this deadly problem. SIGN YOUR NAME: "" But look, right-wing Republicans in Congress are already FUMING over the President's executive actions. They're vowing to defund the Department of Justice in order to ensure these common-sense measures aren't implemented. That's why it's absolutely imperative we stand with President Obama to combat the devastating gun violence routinely sweeping this country and focus on real solutions to leave a safer country for our children. "" "" Thanks for speaking up, BOLD PAC | 220 I St. NE, Suite 280 Washington, DC 20002 | PAID FOR BY BOLDPAC AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
